revenue_recognition.method: Sales-based royalty recognized as services provided over time
revenue_recognition.primary_performance_obligation: IP licenses granting right to access brand IP, reservation systems, and property management systems — considered a series of distinct services over time
revenue_recognition.variable_consideration: Franchise royalty fees allocated to distinct daily services using prescribed variable consideration allocation guidance
revenue_recognition.fixed_consideration: Application, initiation, and other fees allocated based on standalone selling prices; recognized over contract term
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized in period received due to no further service obligation and uncertainty of collection
revenue_recognition.no_significant_financing_component: Upfront fees protect against failure to complete obligations

franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over estimated useful life (contract term including sole-option extensions)
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Opening date of hotel or contract execution date, whichever is later
franchise_contracts.contract_acquisition_costs_amortization: Recognized as reduction to franchise royalty fees
franchise_contracts.impairment_testing: Evaluated for indicators; if present, undiscounted cash flow test performed; impairment recognized if carrying value exceeds fair value; allocated pro rata within asset group

accounts_receivable.description: Primarily amounts due from hotel owners under franchise contracts
accounts_receivable.allowance_method: Based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, current and forecasted business conditions

financing_receivables.description: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners

franchise_deposits.treatment: Recorded as current liability until fees become non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues

deferred_revenues.description: Non-refundable advance consideration from hotel owners (application, initiation, other fees)
deferred_revenues.recognition: Over the term of the related franchise contract

fair_value_measurements.financial_instruments: Carrying value equals fair value as of 12/31/2024 and 12/31/2023
fair_value_measurements.fair_value_option: Not elected for any financial assets or liabilities

acquisitions.policy: Business combination vs asset acquisition based on inputs/processes/outputs and concentration test
acquisitions.asset_acquisitions: Cost allocated to assets/liabilities based on relative fair values; no goodwill recognized

note3_graduate_acquisition.impact_2024: Not material to operating results for partial year

note6_income_taxes.us_tax_status: Disregarded entity; no US income tax provision
note6_income_taxes.foreign_tax_basis: Withholding on franchise fees to foreign-domiciled entities (includes US territories)
note6_income_taxes.franchisee_responsible: For withholding and remittance to local taxing authority

debt_guarantee.description: Unconditionally and irrevocably guarantees certain Hilton debt obligations
debt_guarantee.guarantee_parties: Certain Hilton direct or indirect wholly owned material domestic subsidiaries, including us
debt_guarantee.collateral: All assets and franchise contracts pledged

litigation.description: Various claims and lawsuits in ordinary course; some for substantial sums
litigation.expected_resolution: No material adverse effect on financial position, results, or cash flows

note8_related_party.intercompany_balances: Result of Hilton's centralized cash management system (not controlled by entity)
note8_related_party.franchise_deposits: Collected by Hilton affiliates, deposited in lockbox entity cannot access
note8_related_party.settlement_pattern: Periodic settlements of other receivables with simultaneous distributions
note8_related_party.graduate_note: Short-term note payable of $85.3M for Graduate acquisition, settled February 2024 with accrued interest
note8_related_party.operator_agreement: With Hilton affiliate; no compensation paid in any year

missing_accounting_items.depreciation_amortization: Franchise contracts amortized straight-line; no tangible depreciable assets held by entity
missing_accounting_items.impairment: No impairment charges disclosed; entity evaluates for indicators
missing_accounting_items.lease_accounting: No leases disclosed; entity appears to have no real property
missing_accounting_items.variable_interest_entities: Not applicable; entity is itself a subsidiary
missing_accounting_items.advertising_fund_accounting: Program Fees not a trust fund; excess QA fees supplement Program Fee; no separate fund accounting
